positive: Minimalist forest creature silhouette, central composition, depicting a majestic raccoon with exaggerated, wise eyes and a playful pose, surrounded by stylized fern leaves and subtle forest flora. The design should use deep indigo blue and burnt orange tones against a creamy off-white background. Flat vector style mixed with subtle watercolor wash textures for depth. Crisp outlines, high contrast, perfect for apparel print, suitable for negative space printing, elegant, whimsical, nature-inspired.
